test case id: tc-user-001 title: user registration with valid credentials module: user management source pages: 2,3 preconditions: test data: - email: test@example.com - password: test123 test steps: 1. user enters email and password into the ui. 2. ui sends the data to firebase/authentication. 3. firebase/authentication validates the data. 4. firebase/authentication retrieves user data from firestore. 5. firebase/authentication returns a token to the ui. 6. ui saves the user in the system. 7. ui confirms the save operation. expected result: user account is successfully created and saved in the system.
